name: Rasa
description:
The Fourth Kazekage was the previous leader of Sunagakure. He is the father of [Temari](https://anilist.co/character/2174), [Kankuro](https://anilist.co/character/4694), and [Gaara](https://anilist.co/character/1662), and husband of [Karura](https://anilist.co/character/22248).

(Source: Narutopedia)
